author: lOrm
content: Verified: cost_tracked event exists in src/session/pricing.rs (line 53/588 — tracing::info!(event='cost_tracked', ...) carrying model + token buckets + web-search hits + cache stats). That covers spend OBSERVABILITY but not the budget-abort path the issue asks for. As a partial landing, this batch added StopConditionsConfig { max_total_input_tokens, max_total_output_tokens, ... } in src/config/stop_conditions.rs with is_stop_condition_met() returning Some(StopReason::InputTokenBudget|OutputTokenBudget) when cumulative spend crosses a configurable cap (see #587 close). Remaining gap: turn-loop integration in pipeline.rs that (a) accumulates per-turn deltas into a session-scoped counter, (b) consults StopConditionsConfig at turn end, (c) aborts with the structured reason. The config schema + predicate are now in place; the loop wire-up is the residual work.
